study.name: A single-cell and spatially resolved atlas of human breast cancers
study.samples: all six primary breast-cancer Visium sections in the deposited filtered matrices
study.independence_claim: study, patients, and deposited samples were absent from all HistoWeave training and model-selection landscapes at protocol lock

frozen_policy.reason: n=9 gated personalisation was not superior to the global default

execution.normalisation: log1p counts per 10000 via histoweave log1p_cp10k
execution.n_domains: number of observed pathology labels in each section
execution.subsampling: none expected; otherwise deterministic pathology-stratified sampling
execution.method_parameters: project defaults plus n_domains and random_state where supported

confirmatory_endpoint.name: study-level mean regret of frozen spectral policy
confirmatory_endpoint.definition: per section: max mean ARI among locked methods minus mean ARI of spectral; then average equally across sections
confirmatory_endpoint.confidence_interval: percentile bootstrap over sections, seed 20260722, 10000 replicates

secondary_endpoints: mean ARI of each locked method
BANKSY-Python diagnostic run under the same seeds, excluded from the locked confirmatory comparator
TLS signature transport reported separately from domain-selection validation

decision_rules.pass: confirmatory success rule met on at least four evaluable sections
decision_rules.fail: mean regret exceeds 0.02 or fewer than four sections are evaluable
decision_rules.policy_after_test: a failed test retains the global fallback and blocks any external-validity claim; a passed test supports the frozen global policy but not personalised superiority
